description: Investor-avatar taxonomy, routing, lens profiles, and evidence package helper for China-focused CollectorX sources, including research-document explicit content extraction, audited legacy/binary XLS parser boundaries, document scope-policy audit, email research, investment-note, task-calendar checklist/timezone/repeat surfaces, meeting-minutes decision/action/participant-role surfaces, WeChat article behavior/boundary summaries, and social influence surface/boundary summaries plus path-level source audits.
